message.content:
@startuml
title AI takes a turn

actor Controller

participant " : AIController" as AI

Controller -> AI : Step()

loop for all Robot r in robots
    AI -> AI : HandleRobot(r)
end

loop for all TeleportGate t in teleporters
    AI -> AI : HandleTeleportGate(t)
end

loop for all Ufo u in ufos
    AI -> AI : HandleUfo(u)
end

AI -->> Controller
@enduml
